name: NexTech Specialty Healthcare EHR API
what_it_does: NexTech specialty healthcare EHR and practice management REST API for dermatology, plastic surgery, ophthalmology, medical spa, and aesthetic medicine practices. Enables AI agents to manage clinical documentation and treatment plan creation for specialty aesthetic practice workflow automation, handle appointment scheduling and patient communication for specialty practice scheduling automation, access cosmetic procedure and treatment catalog for medical spa service management automation, retrieve photo management and before/after documentation for aesthetic practice visual documentation automation, manage patient marketing and loyalty program for medical spa patient retention automation, handle e-commerce and online booking for aesthetic service booking automation, access HIPAA-compliant patient portal and communication for specialty practice patient engagement, retrieve revenue cycle and billing integration for specialty practice collections automation, manage outcomes tracking and patient satisfaction for aesthetic practice quality automation, and integrate NexTech with aesthetic device manufacturers, med spa suppliers, and cosmetic finance platforms (CareCredit, Alphaeon) for end-to-end aesthetic practice management.
use_cases: Documenting aesthetic treatments from specialty clinical agents
Booking cosmetic procedures from patient scheduling agents
Managing before/after photos from aesthetic documentation agents
Tracking patient loyalty from medical spa retention agents
best_when: A dermatology, plastic surgery, ophthalmology, or medical spa practice wanting AI agents to automate clinical documentation, aesthetic appointment scheduling, before/after photo management, and patient retention programs within NexTech's specialty-built EHR platform.
avoid_when: HIPAA PHOTO DOCUMENTATION MINIMUM NECESSARY ACCESS: Automated before/after photo management via NexTech for aesthetic procedures requires HIPAA minimum necessary standard for photo access; automated photo sharing or AI analysis without patient consent for specific photo use creates HIPAA violation; implement photo consent tracking before automated photo processing. COSMETIC PROCEDURE CONSENT DOCUMENTATION COMPLETENESS: Automated treatment plan creation via NexTech must verify procedure-specific informed consent documentation before treatment scheduling; automated cosmetic procedure scheduling without consent form completion creates patient safety and malpractice liability. COSMETIC FINANCING INTEGRATION APPROVAL STATUS: Automated cosmetic procedure scheduling via NexTech linked to CareCredit or Alphaeon financing must verify financing approval status before confirming procedure date; automated procedure scheduling without confirmed financing creates no-show and collection risk for high-ticket cosmetic procedures.

auth.notes: NexTech uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Tampa, Florida HQ. Founded 1997. Private (Francisco Partners). 30,000+ healthcare providers. Specialty EHR for dermatology, plastic surgery, ophthalmology, medical spa. Photo management and before/after documentation. Patient marketing and loyalty programs. CareCredit and Alphaeon cosmetic financing integration. E-commerce and online booking for aesthetic services. Competes with ModMed, Aesthetics Pro, and PatientNow for aesthetic practice management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription per provider
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per provider; specialty module pricing for EHR, practice management, and e-commerce; API access in enterprise tier
pricing.notes: Tampa FL. Private (Francisco Partners). Founded 1997. 30,000+ providers. Annual subscription per provider. Specialty aesthetics and medical EHR pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; patient data and photo queries throttled; webhooks for appointment and document events

known_agent_gotchas: PHOTO CONSENT TRACKING BEFORE AUTOMATED IMAGE PROCESSING: NexTech before/after photo repository contains patient PHI; automated photo retrieval for AI analysis, portfolio use, or marketing must verify patient photo release consent for specific use case; automated photo processing without use-specific consent creates HIPAA violation and state right of publicity exposure

COSMETIC PROCEDURE CONSENT COMPLETENESS GATE: Automated cosmetic procedure scheduling must verify all required procedure-specific consent forms are completed and signed; automated appointment creation for high-risk procedures (injectables, surgery, laser) without consent verification creates patient safety liability

COSMETIC FINANCING APPROVAL BEFORE PROCEDURE CONFIRMATION: Automated treatment scheduling linked to patient cosmetic financing (CareCredit, Alphaeon Credit) must verify financing approval and available credit before confirming procedure date; automated procedure scheduling without confirmed financing creates collection risk for high-ticket cosmetic procedures averaging $2,000-$15,000

HIPAA MINIMUM NECESSARY FOR AESTHETIC PHOTO DATA: Aesthetic before/after photos contain facial identification data with heightened sensitivity; automated photo API access must implement minimum necessary scope limited to treating provider workflow; bulk photo export for AI training or population analysis without individual patient authorization creates HIPAA violation

FRANCISCO PARTNERS ACQUISITION INTEGRATION CHANGES: NexTech was acquired by Francisco Partners; platform API investment and product roadmap may evolve post-acquisition; validate API endpoint stability and NexTech's current developer program investment before building deep NexTech-specific automation

MEDICAL SPA NON-PHYSICIAN SCOPE OF PRACTICE: Automated treatment plan creation and scheduling must apply state-specific medical spa scope of practice rules; some states require physician oversight for specific aesthetic procedures (injectables, laser, chemical peels); automated scheduling without scope of practice validation creates state medical board compliance risk
agent_readiness.security_notes: Specialty aesthetic EHR. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Patient PHI, before/after photos, and aesthetic treatment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Aesthetic specialty EHR. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Patient PHI, facial photos, and cosmetic treatment data.
